test.command: set -e; ROOT="/Users/lubomirmolin/PhpstormProjects/codex-mobile-companion"; if [ ! -f "$ROOT/apps/mobile/pubspec.yaml" ] && [ ! -f "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" ] && [ ! -d "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell" ]; then echo "workspace not scaffolded yet"; exit 0; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/apps/mobile/pubspec.yaml" ]; then (cd "$ROOT/apps/mobile" && flutter test --concurrency=5); fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" ]; then cargo test --manifest-path "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" --workspace --jobs 5; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell/CodexMobileCompanion.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj" ]; then xcodebuild test -project "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell/CodexMobileCompanion.xcodeproj" -scheme CodexMobileCompanion -destination 'platform=macOS'; fi

typecheck.command: ROOT="/Users/lubomirmolin/PhpstormProjects/codex-mobile-companion"; if [ ! -f "$ROOT/apps/mobile/pubspec.yaml" ] && [ ! -f "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" ] && [ ! -d "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell" ]; then echo "workspace not scaffolded yet"; exit 0; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/apps/mobile/pubspec.yaml" ]; then flutter analyze "$ROOT/apps/mobile"; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" ]; then cargo check --manifest-path "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" --workspace --all-targets; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell/CodexMobileCompanion.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj" ]; then xcodebuild -project "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell/CodexMobileCompanion.xcodeproj" -scheme CodexMobileCompanion -destination 'platform=macOS' build >/dev/null; fi

lint.command: set -e; ROOT="/Users/lubomirmolin/PhpstormProjects/codex-mobile-companion"; if [ ! -f "$ROOT/apps/mobile/pubspec.yaml" ] && [ ! -f "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" ] && [ ! -d "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell" ]; then echo "workspace not scaffolded yet"; exit 0; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/apps/mobile/pubspec.yaml" ]; then flutter analyze "$ROOT/apps/mobile"; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" ]; then cargo fmt --manifest-path "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" --all --check && cargo clippy --manifest-path "$ROOT/Cargo.toml" --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings; fi; if [ -f "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell/CodexMobileCompanion.xcodeproj/project.pbxproj" ]; then xcodebuild -project "$ROOT/apps/mac-shell/CodexMobileCompanion.xcodeproj" -scheme CodexMobileCompanion -destination 'platform=macOS' build >/dev/null; fi

blockingIssues.description: The startup path now launches `tailscale serve --bg 3110` and fail-closes pairing when runtime checks detect the mapping disappeared, but route verification still accepts any `tailscale serve status --json` entry that merely mentions `3110`. A stale or unrelated Serve config can therefore be misclassified as a valid HTTPS proxy to `localhost:3110`, so the canonical pairing route guarantee is not fully closed yet.

appliedUpdates.description: Expanded `.factory/library/security.md` with the startup invariant that the canonical pairing path must verify or provision `tailscale serve` for the localhost bridge port and fail closed when that mapping cannot be confirmed or later disappears.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add an explicit Exec-mode branch describing when automated evidence can substitute for the required manual pairing-route success/fail walkthroughs and what evidence the worker must record when Tailscale Serve cannot be enabled locally.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Both rerun fix reviews for pairing-route startup work (`pairing-security-fix-verified-private-route-startup` and `pairing-security-launch-and-verify-tailscale-serve`) recorded worker deviations because the current `security-worker` skill still requires manual route verification without explaining the acceptable Exec-mode substitute when Tailscale Serve is unavailable in the environment.

rejectedObservations.observation: The shared service manifest still presents `tailscale-serve` as a separate helper even though bridge startup now attempts provisioning itself.
rejectedObservations.reason: ambiguous: the separate helper service is still useful for manual operations, and changing it would require a non-additive edit to an existing service definition rather than a low-risk factual addition.

rejectedObservations.observation: The shared `tailscale-serve` healthcheck should be tightened beyond `tailscale serve status | grep 3110` so it matches the product's stricter verified-route invariant.
rejectedObservations.reason: rejected because validators should not overwrite existing service entries; aligning that healthcheck requires a dedicated follow-up change to an existing manifest entry, not an additive validator-owned update.
